title: Community Owned Dex on HL: Kittenswap
summary_title: KittenSwap's 30% airdrop flipped HyperSwap's TVL with one clever move
summary_description: Two DeFi OGs built a concentrated liquidity DEX on HyperEVM without raising a seed round, using MechaCats NFTs and a wide token distribution to overtake competitors.

key_moments.label: Founders introduce themselves and DeFi background
Why KittenSwap chose concentrated liquidity pools over UniV2 AMM
30% airdrop and points program distribution strategy explained
KittenSwap surpassed HyperSwap TVL despite launching second
MechaCats NFTs as seed round alternative, boosted points multiplier
Dual points with other protocols like HyperFi and Kaiko explained
Best yield strategy: K-USD/USDC pool with triple points
MechaCats holders get 3% of token at TGE plus whitelist access

pull_quote: Our airdrop is 30% of our supply so as many people as possible who want to work with us and integrate gain tokens, which attracted a lot of users and builders.
